form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (17.47) in a Class 3, finishing a 10 length fifth. Has performed well off the draw with a win and three places from seven starts. Can measure up on best.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Last start finished 5th in a Class 3 on April 2 over 295m at this track behind Rubber Jay beaten 2.25 lengths (17.34). Has run hot time here with a 16.87 PB at the distance. Has ability and is a key chance.

form.formComment: Recorded his 7th career win last time out (16.70) at this track and drawn box 7 for the first time here. In sparkling form and can win again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Eased and turned head outwards in home straight fell.
Eased down after finish and contacted.

form.formComment: Hit the frame latest (22.93) when second at Ascot Park in a Class 3. Yet to miss the placings in five runs from this box, including two wins. Big chance to make amends.
